description: A logistics service server providing package tracking, delivery time estimation, and shipping cost estimation for major Chinese courier companies.

tools.name: query_trace
tools.description: Query logistics tracking information for a package using its tracking number.

kuaidi_num.description: The tracking number of the package to query.

phone.description: The recipient's phone number. Required when the courier company is SF Express (shunfeng) for identity verification.

kuaidi_num.description: The tracking number of the queried package.

kuaidi_company.description: The courier company code that handles this package (e.g., shunfeng, jd, yuantong).

data.description: Chronological list of tracking events for the package.

time.description: The timestamp when the tracking event occurred.

context.description: The description of the tracking event at this node (e.g., package picked up, in transit, delivered).

tools.name: estimate_time
tools.description: Estimate delivery time based on courier company, origin/destination addresses, order time, and service type. For in-transit packages, historical tracking data can be provided for more accurate prediction.

from_addr.description: The origin address for shipping. Must include 3 administrative levels (province/city/district), e.g., '广东省深圳市南山区'. Complete missing levels if necessary.

kuaidi_company.description: The courier company code in lowercase. Supported values: shunfeng, jd, debangkuaidi, yuantong, zhongtong, shentong, yunda, ems.

to_addr.description: The destination address for shipping. Must include 3 administrative levels (province/city/district), e.g., '北京市海淀区'. Complete missing levels if necessary.

exp_type.description: The service or product type for shipping. Allowed values: '标准快递' (standard), '经济快递' (economy), '特快专递' (express).

order_time.description: The order placement time in format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss', e.g., '2023-08-08 08:08:08'. Defaults to current time if not provided. For relative dates like 'tomorrow', calculate from today as base.

logistic.description: Historical tracking data for predicting remaining transit time for in-transit packages. Format: JSON array string, e.g., '[{"time":"2025-05-09 13:15:26","context":"您的快件离开【吉林省吉林市桦甸市】"}]'. Each object contains 'time' (tracking node timestamp) and 'context' (event description).

arrivalTime.description: The estimated arrival date and time for the package delivery.

remaining_transit_time.description: The estimated remaining transit time in hours until delivery.

tools.name: estimate_price
tools.description: Estimate shipping cost based on courier company, origin/destination addresses, and package weight.

kuaidi_company.description: The courier company code in lowercase. Supported values: shunfeng, jd, debangkuaidi, yuantong, zhongtong, shentong, yunda, ems.

from_addr.description: The origin address for shipping. Must include 3 administrative levels (province/city/district), e.g., '广东省深圳市南山区'. Complete missing levels if necessary.

to_addr.description: The destination address for shipping. Must include 3 administrative levels (province/city/district), e.g., '北京市海淀区'. Complete missing levels if necessary. If user doesn't provide destination, prompt them for it before calling this service.

weight.description: The package weight in kilograms (no unit suffix needed), e.g., '1.0'. Defaults to '1.0' kg if not specified.

price.description: The estimated shipping cost for the package.

currency.description: The currency code for the price (e.g., 'CNY' for Chinese Yuan).

estimated_days.description: The estimated number of days for delivery.
